reviews.author: Japneet Singh saluja
reviews.review_body: THE SD VIDYA SCHOOL, NOIDA Wonderful school providing awesome education and activities. One of the best schools in Noida. The staff connects with the child in the way that every child in a class understand the concepts instead of cramming things. The team of the school very polite with the children. In some time we noticed that there is a bonding between the staff and students like a friend. I, as a parent, motivate others for enrolling their child in The SD Vidya School Noida best school in noida . excellent learning

reviews.author: VIVEK BHATIA
reviews.review_body: The SD Vidya School. It has the best sports activities. It provides us education without any burden. In our school we celebrate every festival. It is like a family for us. All teachers explain everything in an interesting way. In our school we have Personality Development (PD) classes. Our staff is very polite. The children play district, state, National level in cricket , Dance , Football etc. They encourage their children to do new activities. There are smart boards in every class.

reviews.author: Dhariya III D
reviews.review_body: The school encourages children to do their best. They do not keep stress on children to do their work. The school is best in academics. The school has awesome learning and teaches the students with fun. It also has yoga sessions to keep children healthy. There is a good variety of vegetation in the school. There is also a beautiful garden in the school
